title: Tag cross-repo handoff event
description: One append-only event on the shared handoff spine between the taghag (brain) and tagslut (backbone) repos.

schema_version.description: Bump only on breaking schema changes; readers must check this.

ts.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of when the event was written.

kind.description: handoff=work passed over; blocked=cannot proceed (see needs); question/answer=cross-repo Q&A; data-release=new versioned identity export available; note=informational.

summary.description: Human/agent-readable one-paragraph statement of what happened or what is needed.

git.description: Source-repo git position at write time.

env.description: Environment the producing session ran in. web/phone often lack DB + library mounts.

resources.description: Whether the heavy local resources were actually present in the producing session.

open_questions.description: Unresolved decisions the consumer must answer.

needs.description: For kind=blocked: what must exist/happen to unblock (e.g. 'local $TAGSLUT_DB', 'ISRC export v4').

artifacts.description: Files/tables this event references. Paths are repo-relative or absolute; include a checksum when it matters.

session.description: Producing Claude Code session id, for traceback into the transcript.
